message:
feat(algorithms): add directed clustering coefficient and harden clustering/triangles APIs

Implement clustering_coefficient_directed (Fagiolo 2007) matching
networkx.clustering for directed graphs. Wire directed dispatch into
Python clustering() and average_clustering() bindings. Add
require_undirected guard to triangles(). Disable doctests in
fnx-algorithms Cargo.toml and reformat GML edge-write code.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -4,6 +4,9 @@ version = "0.1.0"
 edition = "2024"
 license-file = "../../LICENSE"
 
+[lib]
+doctest = false
+
 [dependencies]
 fnx-classes = { version = "0.1.0", path = "../fnx-classes" }
 fnx-runtime = { version = "0.1.0", path = "../fnx-runtime" }
